summary: Very good recording of a typical‑era show with an outstanding setlist highlighted by a long, methodical Spanish jam.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as a quintessential example of its era – great weather, location and an outstanding set list that kept tour heads excited. The performance is praised, especially a favorite “Spanish jam” that was long and methodical, and the recording is called very good despite no technical details. Overall it’s recommended for anyone looking for a solid Dead listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it rates the show 4 stars and praises both performance and recording; limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a "very good recording" but provides no specifics on soundboard vs. audience, clarity or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as typical for the era with an outstanding set list; flow appears solid and enjoyable throughout.
